description: You are a Health Information Management (HIM) Specialist maintaining the Patient Master Index (PMI) for a multi-facility hospital system. Build and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Patient Master Index Sync' that listens on TCP port 6665 for HL7 ADT messages (A28, A31, A08). The channel must use a JavaScript transformer to extract mrn (PID-3, first repetition, CX.1 component), last_name (PID-5.1), first_name (PID-5.2), dob (PID-7, formatted as YYYYMMDD), gender (PID-8), and ssn (PID-19) into channel map variables. Implement a Database Writer destination to perform a PostgreSQL UPSERT into the patient_master_index table (where mrn is the primary key) using the logic: 'INSERT INTO patient_master_index (mrn, last_name, first_name, dob, gender, ssn, last_updated, update_count) VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT (mrn) DO UPDATE SET last_name=EXCLUDED.last_name, first_name=EXCLUDED.first_name, dob=EXCLUDED.dob, gender=EXCLUDED.gender, ssn=EXCLUDED.ssn, last_updated=NOW(), update_count=patient_master_index.update_count+1'. Include a Response Transformer that constructs a valid HL7 ACK message with acknowledgment code 'AA' using the MSH-10 Message Control ID from the incoming message. A sample ADT A31 message is located at /home/ga/sample_adt_a31.hl7. PostgreSQL is accessible at jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb (username: postgres, password: postgres) or via 'docker exec nextgen-postgres psql -U postgres -d mirthdb'. The REST API is available at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin) and requires the header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI'. The channel XML must include a <responseTransformer> element.
